description: Barometric pressure expected to drop from 29.80 to 29.50 inHg overnight across the Texas Panhandle region. Individuals sensitive to pressure changes should take precautions.
location: Briscoe TX and surrounding Hall County

description: South winds 20 to 25 mph with gusts up to 35 mph. Loose objects should be secured.
